'''dhamojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xyloidone|xyloidone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xyloidone|xyloidone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhamojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæmejeth|dhæmejeth]] || [[word:dhæmejej|dhæmejej]] || [[word:dhæmejesh|dhæmejesh]] || [[word:dhæmeje|dhæmeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhamomojoth|dhamomojoth]] || [[word:dhamomojoj|dhamomojoj]] || [[word:dhamomojosh|dhamomojosh]] || [[word:dhamomojo|dhamomojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhamojoth|dhamojoth]] || [[word:dhamojoj|dhamojoj]] || [[word:dhamojosh|dhamojosh]] || [[word:dhamojo|dhamojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhamofjoth|dhamofjoth]] || [[word:dhamofjoj|dhamofjoj]] || [[word:dhamofjosh|dhamofjosh]] || [[word:dhamofjof|dhamofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhamojotho|dhamojotho]] || [[word:dhamojojo|dhamojojo]] || [[word:dhamojosho|dhamojosho]] || [[word:dhamojoko|dhamojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhamojoth|dhamojoth]] || [[word:dhamojoj|dhamojoj]] || [[word:dhamojosh|dhamojosh]] || [[word:dhamojo|dhamojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhamojothol|dhamojothol]] || [[word:dhamojojol|dhamojojol]] || [[word:dhamojoshol|dhamojoshol]] || [[word:dhamojokol|dhamojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhamojothotho|dhamojothotho]] || [[word:dhamojojojo|dhamojojojo]] || [[word:dhamojoshosho|dhamojoshosho]] || [[word:dhamojoko|dhamojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhamojothon|dhamojothon]] || [[word:dhamojojon|dhamojojon]] || [[word:dhamojoshon|dhamojoshon]] || [[word:dhamojokon|dhamojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhamojothoro|dhamojothoro]] || [[word:dhamojojoro|dhamojojoro]] || [[word:dhamojoshoro|dhamojoshoro]] || [[word:dhamojokoro|dhamojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
